summary: Iteration 25 - Testing after duplicate code removal from server.py (13,697 -> 11,549 lines). All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, POS, Settings, Reports) working correctly with no console errors.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
GET /api/reports/sales - Returns sales report with total_sales, total_orders, by_payment_method, by_delivery_app, top_products
GET /api/reports/inventory - Returns inventory report with total_items, low_stock_count, total_inventory_value
GET /api/reports/profit-loss - Returns profit/loss report with revenue, gross_profit, net_profit
GET /api/drivers - Returns drivers list
GET /api/drivers/locations - Returns all drivers locations for map
GET /api/deductions - Returns deductions list
GET /api/bonuses - Returns bonuses list
GET /api/payroll - Returns payroll records
GET /api/shifts - Returns shifts list
GET /api/shifts/current - Returns current shift or null
GET /api/cash-register/summary - Returns cash register summary or 404 if no open shift
GET /api/products - Returns products list (regression test)
GET /api/categories - Returns categories list (regression test)
GET /api/employees - Returns employees list (regression test)
GET /api/orders - Returns orders list (regression test)
Reports require authentication - Returns 401/403 without token
Drivers require authentication - Returns 401/403 without token
Payroll requires authentication - Returns 401/403 without token
Shifts require authentication - Returns 401/403 without token

login.notes: Beautiful login page with restaurant background slideshow. Login works correctly with admin@maestroegp.com / admin123.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows quick action buttons (نقاط البيع, الطاولات, شاشة المطبخ, التقارير, التقارير الذكية, المصاريف, الحجوزات, التوصيل, تقارير المخزون, طلبات الفروع, المخزن والتصنيع, المشتريات, الموارد البشرية, سجل المكالمات, برنامج الولاء, الكوبونات, الإعدادات), statistics section with period filters, recent orders.

pos.notes: POS page shows 6 categories with images (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات, دجاج), products with prices, 10 tables grid, order type tabs (محلي, سفري, توصيل), cart with payment options (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل).

settings.notes: Settings page shows 15 tabs (المظهر, المطعم, الرئيسية, المستخدمين, الأدوار والموظفين, العملاء, الفروع, الفئات, المنتجات, الطابعات, إعدادات المخزون, الدفع الإلكتروني, الإشعارات, الكول سنتر, شركات التوصيل).

reports.notes: Reports page shows 9 tabs (المبيعات, المشتريات, المصاريف, الأرباح, الأصناف, التوصيل, الإلغاءات, الخصومات, الآجل), date range filters, branch selector, statistics cards, export buttons (Excel, PDF).

critical_code_review_comments: Code refactoring successful - ~2,148 lines removed from server.py (13,697 -> 11,549 lines)
reports_routes.py - All report endpoints working correctly (sales, inventory, profit-loss)
drivers_routes.py - All driver endpoints working correctly (list, locations)
payroll_routes.py - All payroll endpoints working correctly (deductions, bonuses, payroll)
shifts_routes.py - All shift endpoints working correctly (list, current, cash-register/summary)
shared.py - Shared utilities properly extracted (get_database, get_current_user, build_tenant_query, etc.)
All endpoints properly authenticated with JWT
No regression in original APIs (products, categories, employees, orders)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_25.py - Created comprehensive test suite for iteration 25
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 completed successfully. Code refactoring verified - ~2,148 lines removed from server.py (13,697 -> 11,549 lines). All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, POS, Settings, Reports) working correctly. No JavaScript console errors found. No regression in original APIs. Routes properly registered: reports_routes.py, drivers_routes.py, payroll_routes.py, shifts_routes.py with shared.py for common utilities.
